home.label: Home
home.description: Overview, quick access to your modules and highlights of the day.

mood.label: Mood
mood.description: Capture three positive facts each day and rate your overall mood.

journal.label: Journal
journal.description: A free-form notebook grouped by thread — life transitions, days that mattered, evening writes.

goals.label: Goals
goals.description: Follow up on your yearly objectives.

library.label: Library
library.description: Your personal book library — statuses, notes, extracts, imports from Babelio / Goodreads.

review.label: Review
review.description: Guided yearly review inspired by YearCompass — 15 sections in three parts.

hrt.label: HRT
hrt.description: Track hormone therapy administration and lab results over time.

account.label: My account
account.description: Manage your personal information, security and account preferences.

settings.label: Settings
settings.description: Enable or disable modules and tailor your Nodea experience.

admin.label: Admin
admin.description: Administration tools: manage users, invitation codes and supervision.
